name: Travel / Hauling > Delivery > Local Delivery
taxonomy_path: Labor > Travel / Hauling > Delivery > Local Delivery
basis: Local delivery within Melbourne/Brevard: load, drive one way, unload. ~1 hr round trip in-county at $100/hr. No material. Per-trip. Engine adds trip fee separately.
sources: Local material/equipment delivery within Brevard commonly $75-$150/trip; big-box store delivery $60-$100. Aligns with Manny's load+drive-time model (no separate trip fee baked in).

name: Travel / Hauling > Delivery > Regional Delivery
taxonomy_path: Labor > Travel / Hauling > Delivery > Regional Delivery
basis: Regional delivery beyond Brevard: load + longer round-trip drive (~2.5 hr) at $100/hr. No material. Per-trip. Mileage/range varies - confirm scope. Engine adds trip fee separately.
sources: Out-of-county / regional delivery (Orlando, Vero, Space Coast edges) $200-$350/trip typical; priced on drive time. Ambiguous radius - confirm range with Manny.

name: Travel / Hauling > Disposal > Debris Removal
taxonomy_path: Labor > Travel / Hauling > Disposal > Debris Removal
basis: Copied from Manny's Junk Hauling anchor (load + drive + dump). Disposal = dump/gate fee + load/drive time per Manny's rule; the dump fee is added by the engine's mandatory disposal line, so this is load/haul labor only.
sources: Anchor: Manny's 'Junk Hauling' $200 / 90 min. Cross-check: homeyou Melbourne junk removal avg ~$235; half-truck load $250-$400. Brevard Central Disposal (Cocoa) gate/dump fee added on top.

name: Travel / Hauling > Disposal > Dumpster Rental
taxonomy_path: Labor > Travel / Hauling > Disposal > Dumpster Rental
basis: Passthrough of a roll-off dumpster rental (delivery, rental period, dump). market_price = local 10-yd roll-off ~$375 including standard tonnage. Larger sizes / overweight extra. No HoneyDone labor - vendor drops and hauls.
sources: Melbourne FL 10-yd roll-off $350-$450/haul; $220-$580/week, avg ~$350 (homeyou, budgetdumpster, brevarddumpsters 2026). Brevard base $275-$600 by size.

name: Travel / Hauling > Vehicle > Truck
basis: Vehicle line = truck use/rental passthrough for a hauling job (day rate ~$90 if a truck must be rented). Fuel/mileage may add. Not billable labor by itself; pairs with a hauling/delivery task. Confirm intent with Manny.
sources: Home Depot pickup/box truck rental ~$19-29/75 min local, ~$90-130/day; general work-truck day use. Passthrough / equipment line, not labor.

name: Travel / Hauling > Vehicle > Van
basis: Vehicle line = cargo van use/rental passthrough for a delivery/haul job (day rate ~$90 if rented). Fuel/mileage may add. Not billable labor by itself; pairs with a delivery task. Confirm intent with Manny.
sources: Cargo van rental (Home Depot/Enterprise) ~$90-130/day local; general work-van day use. Passthrough / equipment line, not labor.
